productDisplayName: Basics Men Navy Slim Fit Shirt
description: CompositionBlue denim-styled shirt with a vintage look, made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar with a buttoned front placket, full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, buttoned flap pockets on the chest, thread detailing at the end of the side seams and has a curved hemFittingSlimWash careMachine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not soak or bleachLine dry inside out in shadeWarm iron do not iron on print/embroideryThis denim-styled shirt from the basics Roadies edition is specailly treated to achieve a greased and winter look: specially designed for real rugged men. It's time to jet set on those long bike rides this winter. Pair this shirt with biker jeans, a jacket, biker gloves and sneakers and head out into the winter breeze in absolute comfort.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in shirtsHeight: 5'11" Shoulders: 17.5"
